race.comment: BANG ON TIME (1) closed well but found one better on debut over 1200m at Kembla back on 3 March. Subsequently won a trial to keep her up to the mark. Took a while to make it to the races but she looks to have talent and is the one to beat in this. The biggest threat comes from PINK PERSUASION (9) who is first-up from a 15-week spell. In the money at her first three runs, including a third on debut here over 1300m. Two recent trials should have her ready to make an impression while fresh. STREET FORCE (12) started at $31.0 but was only beaten 2.6 lengths on debut recently over 1100m at Hawkesbury. Likely improver over this longer journey. Kiwi import LE SMOKE (7) is first-up from a 20-week break and is now with Kris Lees. Placed at her only run across the ditch and her trial form since arriving has been okay. Watch the market closely. Recent Rosehill trial winner CHE OLE (5) looks ready to impress first-up from a five-month spell.
